title: Shaped nonwoven
abstract: A nonwoven fabric. The nonwoven fabric can include a first surface and a second surface and a visually discernible pattern of three-dimensional features on one of the first or second surface. Each of the three-dimensional features can define a microzone comprising a first region and a second region. The first and second regions can have a difference in values for an intensive property. The nonwoven further has a plurality of apertures, wherein at least a portion of the aperture abuts at least one of the first region and the second region of the microzone.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A nonwoven fabric comprising a first surface and a second surface and a visually discernible pattern of three-dimensional features on one of the first or second surface, each of the three-dimensional features defining a microzone comprising a first region and a second region, the first and second regions having a difference in values for an intensive property, wherein the intensive property is one or more of: a. thickness, b. basis weight, c. volumetric density; and wherein a plurality of the microzones of the nonwoven fabric further comprise an aperture, and wherein at least a portion of the aperture abuts at least one of the first region and second region. 2. The nonwoven fabric according to claim 1, wherein the pattern of three-dimensional features is a non-regular pattern, a repeating pattern, or combinations thereof. 3. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the first surface has a TS7 value of 3 to 14 dB V2 rms and the second surface has a TS7 value different than the TS7 value of the first surface. 4. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the second surface has a TS7 value that is lower than the first surface TS7 value. 5. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the second surface has a TS7 value of 2 dB V2 rms to 12 dB V2 rms and the first surface has a TS7 value different than the TS7 value of the first surface. 6. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the first surface has a TS7 value that is higher than the second surface TS7 value. 7. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein a ratio of a TS7 value on the first surface to a TS7 value on the second surface is greater than 1. 8. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the intensive property is thickness, and the difference in thickness between the first and second regions is greater than 25 microns. 9. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the intensive property is basis weight, and the difference in basis weight between the first and second regions is greater than S gsm. 10. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the intensive property is volumetric density, and the difference in volumetric density between the first and second regions is greater than 0.042 g/cc. 11. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the intensive property comprises thickness, basis weight, and volumetric density; wherein the difference in thickness between the first and second regions is greater than 25 microns, wherein the difference in basis weight between the first and second regions is greater than 5 gsm, and wherein the difference in volumetric density between the first and second regions is greater than 0.042 g/cc. 12. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein loose fibers extend into the aperture. 13. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the loose fibers extending into the aperture originate in at least one of the abutting first or second regions. 14. An absorbent article comprising a nonwoven according to any preceding claim. 15. The nonwoven fabric according to any preceding claim, wherein the nonwoven fabric is a spunbond construction.
